Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Analyze the Process Description: Start: Receive Application Resume Questionnaire. Stage 1: Resume Parsing Initial Data Check: Activity: ResumeParsing DataCheck. Logic: Loop. If missing info Request More Info Check again. Stage 2: Preliminary Skill Assessment: Activity: SkillAssessment. Stage 3: Cultural Fit Community Affiliation Check The Divergence Point: Model 1 With Unfairness: XOR split. Branch A: Standard CulturalFitEvaluation. Branch B: CommunityAffiliationCheck. Model 2 Without Unfairness: No XOR split. Just standard CulturalFitEvaluation. Stage 4: Managerial Review Final Decision: Activities: ManagerialReview FinalDecision.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2. Define POWL Components: Common Nodes: ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment ManagerialReview FinalDecision. Specific Nodes for Model 1: StandardCulturalFit CommunityAffilCheck. Specific Nodes for Model 2: CulturalFitEvaluation Unified.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 3. Construct Model 1 With Potential Unfairness: Structure: Start with ReceiveApplication. Followed by a Loop node for data checking. Then SkillAssessment. Then an XOR node representing the biased choice. Then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision. Refining the Loop: Body of loop: Check Data. Redo action: Request Info. Loop object: LoopDataCheck RequestMoreInfo. Refining the Order Partial Order: Sequence: ReceiveApp Loop SkillTest XorChoice Review Decision.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 4. Construct Model 2 Without Unfairness: Structure: Same start and skill check. Instead of XOR just one activity FairCulturalFitCheck. End same way.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: SelfCorrectionRefinement on Loop Semantics: In POWLProcess Trees LOOP A B: Execute A. Then choose Exit or execute B then A again. Here A DataCompletenessCheck checks if resume ok. B RequestMoreInfo if not ok. This fits perfectly.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: SelfCorrectionRefinement on Unfairness Logic: The text says XOR choice either you go through a standard cultural fit assessment or you take a path where community affiliation leads to implicit score adjustments. So the XOR node contains 1. StandardCulturalFitEval 2. CommunityAffiliationPath.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Code Construction Steps: 1. Imports pm4py Transition SilentTransition StrictPartialOrder OperatorPOWL Operator. 2. Define Transitions t_receive TransitionReceiveApplication t_check TransitionDataCompletenessCheck t_request TransitionRequestMoreInfo t_skill TransitionSkillAssessment t_culture_std TransitionStandardCulturalFit t_culture_comm TransitionCommunityAffiliationCheck t_review TransitionManagerialReview t_final TransitionFinalDecision. 3. Build Model 1: loop_node OperatorPOWL Operator.LOOP children t_check t_request. xor_bias OperatorPOWL Operator.XOR children t_culture_std t_culture_comm. root StrictPartialOrder nodes t_receive loop_node t_skill xor_bias t_review t_final. Add edges sequentially. 4. Build Model 2: t_fair_culture TransitionUniformCulturalFitCheck. root2 StrictPartialOrder nodes t_receive loop_node t_skill t_fair_culture t_review t_final. Add edges sequentially.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Double Check Requirements: Produce two POWL models. Reflect hiring process with steps described differ in how they handle the cultural fit and affiliation check. First model demonstrates where unfairness could appear second model removes that potential source of bias. Looks good.
